title: Fever as Defense
script_summary: Explores the scientific understanding of fever as a defense mechanism against illness.

segments.voiceover: What if your fever is your body’s secret weapon?
Fever isn’t just discomfort; it’s a natural response to infection.
When your body heats up, it’s fighting back—activating immune cells and slowing down pathogens.
Studies show that a higher body temperature can enhance your immune response. But beware! Not all fevers are helpful.
Fever can be a double-edged sword—it's crucial to monitor its intensity.
Want to learn more about your body’s defense mechanisms? Hit like and follow!
